title: The Dumbest Exploit of 2026?...
summary: Better Stack highlights a security vulnerability in Instagram's AI where users could request account access through the AI interface. The video frames this as a notable example of poor security design in AI-integrated products.
writeup: Better Stack examines a security vulnerability in Instagram's AI, where users could request account access directly through the AI interface. The video presents this as an example of poor security design in AI-integrated products. The takeaway: exposing privileged actions like account access through a conversational AI layer creates exploitable gaps that conventional security controls might otherwise prevent.
